object_under_evaluation: public starter eval bundle integrity on the current aoa-evals corpus
claim_boundary: The repository can review whether public starter bundles stay coherent enough to support only their bounded claims, but the integrity read remains weaker than promotion review or direct agent evaluation.
limitations: This report does not prove direct agent quality.
This report does not prove canonical readiness by itself.

per_target_breakdown.note: The workflow bundle stays distinct from artifact-only and paired bridge reads on the same bounded family.
per_target_breakdown.evidence_coverage: support notes, integrity check, and schema-backed report artifacts all align
per_target_breakdown.routing_note: chooser still routes artifact-only questions away from the composite workflow starter

per_target_breakdown.note: The bridge now has better paired artifacts, but it still must not be read as a baseline-default comparator.
per_target_breakdown.evidence_coverage: comparison contract, runner contract, and paired report are present
per_target_breakdown.routing_note: public wording keeps the bridge separate from the same-task baseline surface

per_target_breakdown.note: The longitudinal starter still needs stronger repeated-window artifacts before movement can be read as more than bounded directional evidence.
per_target_breakdown.evidence_coverage: window contract and example report exist, but shared repeated-window fixture infrastructure is not yet materialized
per_target_breakdown.routing_note: public wording keeps longitudinal movement separate from broad capability narrative
